'''padazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niaprazine|niaprazine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niaprazine|niaprazine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| padazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædæzhæth|pædæzhæth]] || [[word:pædæzhæj|pædæzhæj]] || [[word:pædæzhæsh|pædæzhæsh]] || [[word:pædæzhæ|pædæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padadazhath|padadazhath]] || [[word:padadazhaj|padadazhaj]] || [[word:padadazhash|padadazhash]] || [[word:padadazha|padadazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padazhath|padazhath]] || [[word:padazhaj|padazhaj]] || [[word:padazhash|padazhash]] || [[word:padazha|padazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padafzhath|padafzhath]] || [[word:padafzhaj|padafzhaj]] || [[word:padafzhash|padafzhash]] || [[word:padafzhaf|padafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padazhatha|padazhatha]] || [[word:padazhaja|padazhaja]] || [[word:padazhasha|padazhasha]] || [[word:padazhaka|padazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padazhath|padazhath]] || [[word:padazhaj|padazhaj]] || [[word:padazhash|padazhash]] || [[word:padazha|padazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padazhathal|padazhathal]] || [[word:padazhajal|padazhajal]] || [[word:padazhashal|padazhashal]] || [[word:padazhakal|padazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padazhathatha|padazhathatha]] || [[word:padazhajaja|padazhajaja]] || [[word:padazhashasha|padazhashasha]] || [[word:padazhaka|padazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padazhathan|padazhathan]] || [[word:padazhajan|padazhajan]] || [[word:padazhashan|padazhashan]] || [[word:padazhakan|padazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padazhathaoro|padazhathaoro]] || [[word:padazhajaoro|padazhajaoro]] || [[word:padazhashaoro|padazhashaoro]] || [[word:padazhakaoro|padazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
